spawndoctor.title: Spawn Doctor — why your mob farm is dead:
spawndoctor.playeronly: Run this as a player, standing where you expect spawns.
spawndoctor.cooldown: Please wait %s more second(s) before /spawndoctor again.
spawndoctor.peaceful: Difficulty is PEACEFUL — hostile mobs never spawn. That is the whole problem.
spawndoctor.nomobspawning: The gamerule doMobSpawning is OFF — nothing hostile spawns anywhere.
spawndoctor.captheft: %s hostile mobs are loaded FAR from you vs only %s nearby. The far ones eat the same spawn budget your farm needs — light up caves / clear them. This is the #1 reason a correctly-built farm is dead.
spawndoctor.none: No hard blocker found here. Check: light level on the platform (use a spawn overlay), the build itself, and that you AFK 24-128 blocks from the platform.
spawndoctor.info.ring: Mobs spawn 24-128 blocks from a player: AFK at least 24 blocks away, and the platform must be within 128 blocks of you.
spawndoctor.info.sim: Server simulation distance: %s chunks — the farm must be within that of your AFK spot to tick.
